title: Nokia Stock Trends: AI, Earnings, and Infrastructure Focus
description: Recent reports highlight Nokia stock in relation to AI spending, upcoming earnings, and infrastructure status.

sources.title: NOK Stock Rises Overnight: Retail Bulls Charged After SMCI's Backlog Surge, Call Nokia 'Pillar Of Infrastructure' Ahead Of Earnings
Nokia Continues to Ride the Wave of AI and Data-Center Spending
Nokia Q2 earnings on deck: What to expect

sections.heading: Market Movement and Investor Sentiment
paragraphs: According to Yahoo Finance, NOK stock rose overnight. The report suggests retail investors are charged following a backlog surge from another company and have called Nokia a 'Pillar of Infrastructure' ahead of earnings.

sections.heading: Technology Sector Trends
paragraphs: The Wall Street Journal reports that Nokia continues to ride the wave of AI and data-center spending.

sections.heading: Financial Reporting Schedule
paragraphs: MSN notes that Nokia's Q2 earnings are on deck, providing coverage on what to expect from the report.

faq.q: What is driving interest in Nokia stock?
faq.a: According to Yahoo Finance, interest is driven by retail investors reacting to a backlog surge and viewing Nokia as a 'Pillar of Infrastructure' ahead of earnings.

faq.q: How is Nokia positioned regarding AI?
faq.a: The Wall Street Journal reports that Nokia is continuing to ride the wave of AI and data-center spending.
